labels.note: readFile() contains a long sequence of format checks and parsing branches even though the TXT input fields occur in a fixed, predetermined order.
labels.refactoringNote: Replace the line-prefix dispatch algorithm with a simpler ordered parser, then extract the shared parsing workflow into Input.

labels.note: After simplification, TXTInput.readFile() and XMLInput.readFile() perform the same conceptual steps: read agent data, create the agent, read each receipt, and add each receipt.
labels.refactoringNote: Move the common parsing sequence to Input and leave TXT-specific value extraction in overridable steps.
